hero.headline: AI Engineer
hero.subheadline: I build agentic AI systems and end-to-end automation that turn manual work into recurring revenue.

about.body: Goal-driven AI Engineer building RAG systems, AI agents, job-matching platforms, multimodal model comparison tools, and production automation workflows. I focus on shipping measurable systems that reduce manual work, improve decision-making, and turn complex operations into scalable business outcomes.

highlights: Build agentic workflows and automation systems using FastAPI and GCP
Orchestrate Claude Opus and GPT-Codex workflows (12 min → 3 min runtime)
Build Next.js interfaces and FastAPI/Django backend systems
Deliver service pipelines, CRM workflows, and reporting systems
Full-stack AI implementation with clean client handoff
Diagnosed 20+ workflow issues: context loss, data-formatting, handoffs
Built automation workflows using n8n, APIs, Python, and LLM tools
Built cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter
Developed and shipped iOS and Android app experiences

projects.name: $250K/year content team replacement
projects.description: Two AI agents running a full content operation for Openline: trend research, calendar planning, article and social drafting, image generation, multilingual publishing, video generation, and edit sync across eight platforms.
projects.techStack: Python · LangChain · n8n · FastAPI · Notion · OpenRouter · Claude · GPT · Gemini · Kling
projects.metric: 14 daily workflows · 6 languages · 149 translations/run · 0 manual ops

projects.name: Conover Industries multimodal intake automation
projects.description: Production-ready intake automation that converts manual text, documents, spreadsheets, screenshots, and MP4/audio inputs from Notion into structured JSON, linked action items, review routing, duplicate protection, and audit logs.
projects.techStack: n8n · Notion API · OpenAI API · GPT-5 Mini · GPT-4.1 · GPT-4.1 Mini
projects.metric: All acceptance tests passed · activated in client environment

projects.name: Momentum AI Studio
projects.description: Invite-only content production dashboard for podcast and video teams, connecting a Next.js app to n8n workflows for AI clip generation, project tracking, clip exports, social scheduling, thumbnails, descriptions, audio cleanup, and trim reports.
projects.techStack: Next.js 16 · TypeScript · React 19 · Tailwind CSS · NextAuth · n8n · Reap AI · CleanVoice AI · Google Drive · Google Sheets · Vercel
projects.metric: 5GB uploads · 14 languages · multi-platform posting · 15s processing refresh

projects.name: Multi-agent email attachment processing
projects.description: Multi-agent pipeline for high-volume attachment processing with structured outputs and error-resistant data handling.

projects.name: AI avatar video generation
projects.description: Automated avatar video production from script to final output. Async polling, multi-API orchestration with HeyGen, Submagic, and OpenAI.

projects.name: Content repurposing pipeline
projects.description: Turns long-form videos into platform-specific social clips at scale. 100+ videos per month with 22x ROI.

projects.name: Social distribution + lead capture
projects.description: Automated scheduling, captions, comments, DMs, and lead capture with 5,000+ automated responses per month.

projects.name: Real Estate AI Video Engine
projects.description: Converts one source video into eight platform-ready assets in approximately three minutes.

now.line1: Making AI systems that should exist but usually get stuck at the prototype stage. Simple is hard, measurable is harder, but both are worth it.
now.line2: If you're deciding between a single-model workflow and a multi-agent system, that's usually where I do my best work.

contact.cta: Let's connect. I'm open to AI Engineer roles, contract work, and collaboration on production AI systems.
